description_long: This ornate ceiling-mounted sconce features a classic chandelier design with eight arms radiating symmetrically from a central stem. Each arm supports a cylindrical mesh lampshade, likely made of fine metal or fabric, encasing individual light bulbs. The arms are adorned with intricate scrollwork and decorative flourishes, contributing to a vintage, baroque aesthetic. The central stem is suspended from a chain and ceiling plate, with a decorative finial hanging below the main body. The overall structure is composed of metal, with a light, silvery finish that enhances its elegant appearance. The sconce is designed to provide ambient lighting while serving as a striking decorative centerpiece in upscale urban interiors.
description: An ornate, vintage-style ceiling chandelier with eight mesh-shaded bulbs and elaborate scrollwork arms, finished in a silvery metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of eight mesh lampshades and detailed scrollwork arms radiating from the central stem.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the even distribution of arms and the mesh texture of the shades, with more depth visible in the scrollwork.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the central stem and chain attachment clearly visible, and the symmetry of the arms maintained.
description_view_3: Another rotated view, mirroring view 1, with the mesh shades and ornate arms visible from a slightly different angle.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage baroque chandelier with ornate scrollwork, mesh lampshades, and a silvery metallic finish, evoking classic European elegance.
